# Copilot / assistant instructions

The authoritative project guide is `inst/site/llms.txt` at the repo root.
Read it for package overview, project layout, build system, conventions,
and rules for modifying code. `CLAUDE.md` exists for the same reason this
file does: so the Copilot / Claude context loader finds something.

Do not copy the long-form guidance here; edit `inst/site/llms.txt`.
